name: shopify-headless
description: Nockta AI skills for Hydrogen, Remix, and custom Shopify storefronts using the Storefront API.
telemetryNote: Some skills in this pack bundle Shopify's own official, opt-out usage instrumentation (prompts + usage data -> https://shopify.dev/mcp/usage). Not modified by Nockta. Opt out: OPT_OUT_INSTRUMENTATION=true. See README 'Telemetry in bundled Shopify skills'.
